keyword_analysis.flag: CRITICAL: $22.50 spent with zero conversions. Highest-volume keyword but broad match may be capturing irrelevant traffic. Reduce bid and tighten match type.

keyword_analysis.organic_rank_note: No organic rank — PPC is the only traffic source.
keyword_analysis.flag: HIGH: $15.00 spent with zero conversions. Long-tail should convert better — investigate listing relevance.

keyword_analysis.organic_rank_note: No organic rank — PPC is the only traffic source.
keyword_analysis.flag: HIGH: $12.50 spent with zero conversions. 'Pet' may dilute to dog shoppers. Consider phrase match.

keyword_analysis.organic_rank_note: No organic rank — PPC is the only traffic source.
keyword_analysis.flag: HIGH: $10.00 spent from auto campaign with zero conversions. 'Cordless' is a synonym for 'wireless' — good relevance but no conversion.

keyword_gap_opportunities.recommendation: Launch PPC campaign — SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors using this term, Paw Pure absent. High relevance: product IS battery/wireless.

keyword_gap_opportunities.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
keyword_gap_opportunities.recommendation: Launch PPC campaign — SV 4,800, dog-focused keyword expands TAM. Requires listing copy mentioning dogs.
Launch PPC campaign — SV 4,100. Paw Pure claims 20dB operation — unique selling point. Strong product-keyword fit.
Launch PPC after listing optimization — SV 3,200. EXP-023 queued to add 'small dogs' to title. Wait for indexing.

action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce Manual Keywords daily budget from $30 to $12, Close Automatic from $15 to $8. New total: $20/day (was $45/day). Stops the bleeding while conversion issues are investigated.
action_plan.rationale: 100% of last 7 days' ad spend was wasted ($67.50, zero sales). At $45/day the campaigns will burn $315/week with no evidence of return. Cutting to $20/day saves ~$175/week while maintaining market presence.

action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce bid from ~$1.25 to $0.75. Switch from broad to phrase match to reduce irrelevant impressions.
action_plan.rationale: Highest-spend keyword with zero conversions. Broad match on a high-volume term (18,100 SV) likely capturing irrelevant traffic. Phrase match + lower bid focuses spend on more relevant queries.

action_plan.recommended_change: Audit listing: main image, price competitiveness ($49.99 vs competitors), review count, bullet points. 54 ad clicks and 0 purchases suggests a listing conversion problem, not just a keyword problem. Organic CVR is 5.13% which shows the listing CAN convert — investigate why ad traffic doesn't.
action_plan.rationale: Zero ad conversion from 54 clicks is a systemic issue. Even poor keywords should convert at 1-2% with a decent listing. The gap between organic CVR (5.13%) and ad CVR (0%) suggests ad traffic quality mismatch or listing not competitive for ad-driven shoppers.

action_plan.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce bid from ~$1.25 to $0.65. This is a long-tail keyword that should convert better — lower bid preserves presence while limiting waste.
action_plan.rationale: Long-tail phrase match keyword with zero conversions despite 12 clicks. At lower bid, still gets impressions but at reduced cost per click.

action_plan.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce bid from ~$1.25 to $0.60. Change match type from broad to phrase — 'pet' in broad match may dilute to dog-only shoppers.
action_plan.rationale: 'Pet' qualifier broadens audience beyond cat owners. Phrase match limits to closer variations while lower CPC reduces waste.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact match target at $0.75 CPC. SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors targeting this, Paw Pure absent. Product IS battery/wireless — perfect fit.
action_plan.rationale: Largest keyword gap by search volume. High product relevance. Exact match at conservative bid limits risk while testing conversion.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact match target at $0.70 CPC. SV 4,100. Paw Pure's 20dB quiet operation is a unique advantage — this keyword aligns directly with a product differentiator.
action_plan.rationale: Strong product-keyword fit. Paw Pure has a genuine competitive advantage on 'quiet' — shoppers searching this term are pre-qualified for our USP.

action_plan.recommended_change: Cannot directly adjust auto campaign keyword bids — add 'cordless cat water fountain' as exact match in Manual Keywords Campaign at $0.70 CPC, then negate from auto campaign. This gives bid control.
action_plan.rationale: Auto campaign keyword with good relevance ('cordless' = 'wireless') but no bid control. Graduate to manual campaign for optimization.

action_plan.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact match at $0.65 CPC AFTER updating listing bullets to mention compatibility with small dogs. SV 4,800.
action_plan.rationale: Dog-focused keyword expands addressable market. Must update listing first to avoid high bounce rate from dog owners not seeing relevance.

action_plan.recommended_change: Pull search terms report manually and add negative keywords for irrelevant terms. Add 'motion sensor' as negative keyword immediately (Paw Pure doesn't have this feature).
action_plan.rationale: Auto campaigns match broadly — without negative keywords, budget leaks to irrelevant searches. 'Motion sensor' is a confirmed feature Paw Pure lacks.

critical: 100% WASTED AD SPEND: $67.50 spent in last 7 days with ZERO ad-attributed sales.
LIFETIME ACoS 123.63%: Total ad spend ($339.94) exceeds total ad sales ($274.96) by $64.98.
CPC AT CEILING: Average CPC of $1.25 is at the maximum acceptable threshold.
SC LOGIN BLOCKED: Latest data scrape (2026-04-04) failed — Seller Central login required. Analysis uses 2026-04-03 data.
warning: SAMPLE SIZE CAVEAT: Campaign-level spend is estimated ($67.50) based on CPC × clicks. Keyword-level data from SC was partially unavailable due to Campaign Manager rendering limitations.
46% OF TARGETS BLEEDING: 6 of 13 targets have clicks but zero sales in last 14 days.
NO ORGANIC RANKING: Paw Pure has no organic rank for any tracked keyword — entirely dependent on PPC for keyword-driven traffic.
CEREBRO DATA IS SEED FILE: Keyword intelligence is from manual seed data, not automated Helium 10 pull. Organic ranks and competitor data may be incomplete.
positive: ORGANIC CVR HEALTHY: 5.13% conversion rate from organic sessions (4 units from 78 sessions) — listing can convert when traffic is qualified.
BUY BOX SECURED: 99.64-100% Buy Box share — no competitive issues there.

4 HIGH-VALUE KEYWORD GAPS IDENTIFIED: 'battery operated cat fountain' (SV 7,200), 'quiet cat water fountain' (SV 4,100), 'automatic dog water fountain' (SV 4,800), 'small dog water fountain' (SV 3,200). Combined SV = 19,300.

one_action_this_week.action: Cut daily budgets from $45/day to $20/day ($12 manual, $8 auto) and reduce all manual keyword bids to $0.65-$0.75.
one_action_this_week.rationale: Every dollar spent on PPC right now is wasted — zero ad sales in the last 7 days. Cutting budgets and bids immediately stops the hemorrhaging ($175/week savings) while keeping campaigns live for data collection. Do NOT pause campaigns entirely — you need impression and click data to diagnose the conversion problem. Next week: investigate why 54 clicks = 0 purchases (listing audit).
